title: Juan Hernandez
compiled_truth: Juan Hernandez is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-06-16 to 2002-01-29), Juan Hernandez sent 228 and received 756 emails, totalling 984 interactions. Top correspondents: [Don Baughman](people/don-baughman) (17), [Rudy Acevedo](people/rudy-acevedo) (15), [Sandra Hernandez](people/sandra-hernandez-crescentcom) (15), [Wayne Herndon](people/wayne-herndon) (14), [Kayne Coulter](people/kayne-coulter) (12). Mailbox folders observed: _sent_mail, enron_power, power, sent, sent_items, to_do.
